operation.executable: lambda token, env: {'pos': token['pos'], 'text': 'babhūva', 'applied_rules': token.get('applied_rules', []) + ['P. 6.1.8 (Liti Dhatur Anabhyasasya)']} if env.get('root') == 'bhū' and env.get('tense') == 'perfect' else token

lambda token, env: {'pos': token['pos'], 'text': 'ghnanti', 'applied_rules': token.get('applied_rules', []) + ['P. 7.3.54 (Ho Hante Nninesu)']} if env.get('root') == 'han' and env.get('tense') == 'present' and env.get('number') == 'plural' else token
